title: Integrate PactBench with RepoPact Proving Ground

acceptance_criteria.text: RepoPact (the standard) defines the benchmark PROTOCOL only: contract language, validation semantics, evidence expectations, hypotheses (H8-H13), and falsification criteria, in research/benchmark-protocol.md and research/protocol.md. The standard repo does not embed a runnable benchmark implementation.

The runnable PactBench suite (task format + tasks, fixtures, harnesses, S5 drift harness, captures, result bundles) is hosted in the RepoPact Proving Ground repo (ForgeWireLabs/repopact-proving-ground), which consumes RepoPact from PyPI and runs the suite against the packaged product.

References are consistent across repos: repopact docs/README/work items point at the Proving Ground for the runnable suite; the Proving Ground points back at RepoPact's protocol. Real cross-model result bundles remain operator-gated (compute/keys).
